name: Expand Site
description: 8-stage client site-building pipeline with project management, deliverable tracking, client feedback, and change orders.
author: Expanded Learning Solutions

2: ALTER TABLE el_es_projects ADD COLUMN decision_maker_id BIGINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 0 AFTER client_user_id
ALTER TABLE el_es_projects ADD COLUMN deadline DATETIME NULL AFTER scope_locked_at
ALTER TABLE el_es_projects ADD COLUMN deadline_stage TINYINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 0 AFTER deadline
ALTER TABLE el_es_projects ADD COLUMN flagged_at DATETIME NULL AFTER deadline_stage
ALTER TABLE el_es_projects ADD COLUMN flag_reason VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT '' AFTER flagged_at
ALTER TABLE el_es_projects ADD COLUMN project_type VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT '' AFTER flag_reason
ALTER TABLE el_es_projects ADD COLUMN project_goal TEXT AFTER project_type
ALTER TABLE el_es_projects ADD COLUMN discovery_transcript LONGTEXT AFTER project_goal
ALTER TABLE el_es_projects ADD COLUMN discovery_extracted_at DATETIME NULL AFTER discovery_transcript
ALTER TABLE el_es_pages ADD COLUMN ai_draft_content LONGTEXT AFTER sort_order
ALTER TABLE el_es_pages ADD COLUMN client_review_status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'pending' AFTER ai_draft_content
ALTER TABLE el_es_pages ADD COLUMN content_blocks LONGTEXT AFTER client_review_status

CREATE TABLE el_es_stakeholders (id BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, project_id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL, user_id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL, role VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'contributor', added_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

CREATE TABLE el_es_project_definition (id BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, project_id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL, site_description TEXT, primary_goal TEXT, secondary_goals TEXT, target_customers TEXT, user_types LONGTEXT, site_type VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT '', locked_at DATETIME NULL, locked_by BIGINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 0, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

CREATE TABLE el_es_brand_options (id BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, project_id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL, has_existing_brand TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0, mood_board_url VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT '', ai_options LONGTEXT, selected_option TINYINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 0, custom_primary VARCHAR(7) DEFAULT '', custom_secondary VARCHAR(7) DEFAULT '', custom_accent VARCHAR(7) DEFAULT '', font_heading VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT '', font_body VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT '', brand_locked_at DATETIME NULL, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

CREATE TABLE el_es_user_workflows (id BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, project_id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL, user_type VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, submitted_by BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL, description LONGTEXT NOT NULL, is_initial TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1, locked_at DATETIME NULL, locked_by BIGINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 0, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

CREATE TABLE el_es_deadlines (id BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, project_id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL, stage TINYINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL, deadline DATETIME NOT NULL, set_by BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL, extended_at DATETIME NULL, met TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
3: CREATE TABLE el_es_proposals (id BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, project_id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL, proposal_number VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT '', status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'draft', client_name VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT '', client_organization VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT '', client_email VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT '', proposal_title VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT '', project_dates VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT '', project_location VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT '', scope_description LONGTEXT, goals_objectives LONGTEXT, activities_description LONGTEXT, deliverables_text LONGTEXT, budget_low DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0, budget_high DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0, final_price DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0, payment_terms LONGTEXT, terms_conditions LONGTEXT, sent_at DATETIME NULL, accepted_at DATETIME NULL, declined_at DATETIME NULL, accepted_by BIGINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 0, created_by BIGINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 0, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
4: ALTER TABLE el_es_proposals ADD COLUMN section_situation LONGTEXT NULL
ALTER TABLE el_es_proposals ADD COLUMN section_what_we_build LONGTEXT NULL
ALTER TABLE el_es_proposals ADD COLUMN section_why_els LONGTEXT NULL
ALTER TABLE el_es_proposals ADD COLUMN section_investment LONGTEXT NULL
ALTER TABLE el_es_proposals ADD COLUMN section_next_steps LONGTEXT NULL
5: ALTER TABLE el_es_projects ADD COLUMN organization_id BIGINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 0 AFTER client_user_id
8: ALTER TABLE el_es_project_definition ADD COLUMN review_status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'draft' AFTER site_type

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS el_es_definition_reviews (id BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, project_id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL, round TINYINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 1, sent_by BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL, sent_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, deadline DATETIME NULL, reminder_sent_at DATETIME NULL, status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'open', dm_decision VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'accepted|needs_revision', dm_note TEXT, dm_decided_at DATETIME NULL, dm_decided_by BIGINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 0, KEY project_id (project_id))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS el_es_definition_comments (id BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, review_id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL, project_id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL, field_key VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT 'site_description|primary_goal|etc|overall', parent_id BIGINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '0=top-level thread reply=parent id', user_id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL, comment TEXT NOT NULL, verdict VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'approved|needs_revision', created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, KEY review_id (review_id), KEY field_key (field_key), KEY parent_id (parent_id))
7: ALTER TABLE el_es_project_definition MODIFY COLUMN site_type VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT ''
6: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS el_es_review_items (id BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, project_id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL, review_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, title VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT '', status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'open', deadline DATETIME NULL, closed_by BIGINT UNSIGNED NULL, closed_at DATETIME NULL, dm_decision LONGTEXT NULL, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS el_es_review_votes (id BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, review_item_id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL, user_id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL, vote_data LONGTEXT NOT NULL, comment TEXT NULL, submitted_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, UNIQUE KEY unique_vote (review_item_id, user_id))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS el_es_annotations (id BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, review_item_id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL, user_id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL, pos_x DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL, pos_y DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL, comment TEXT NOT NULL, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS el_es_templates (id BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, title VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, style_category VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, description TEXT, image_url VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT '', sort_order INT DEFAULT 0, is_active TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

shortcodes.description: Expand Site client portal showing project stage, deliverables, and feedback options
Visual stage progress bar for a project
Page-by-page deliverable review interface for clients
Structured feedback submission form for clients
